data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Reviewed color/emoji helpers in install.sh, agent-wizard.sh, setup.sh. All three scripts add TTY-aware formatting (NO_COLOR/CI/TERM=dumb gates), UTF-8 locale-gated emoji with plain-text fallbacks, and semantic log functions (step/success/tip/warn/fail). Heredoc launcher escaping verified correct — unescaped $APP_DIR etc. are intentional baked-in defaults matching pre-existing pattern. No behavioral changes to install flow, prompts, or settings output. Quality gates all pass: bash -n syntax, lint (0 errors), typecheck, 2003/2003 tests, build. No security issues or regressions.
